primary_metrics: Recall of true top quartile at 25 percent docking budget

fixed_target_note: V4-C is explicitly fixed-target. Target permutation or antigen ablation is not a meaningful promotion gate for this sequence-only competition surrogate; those gates remain mandatory for any future model claiming target conditioning across antigens.
feasibility_rule: No recall or enrichment threshold may be changed after test unseal. Before unseal, report the exact attainable grid implied by 32 rows and a top-quartile endpoint.
failure_action: Do not deploy the learned geometry surrogate. Retain v3_full only as a weak generic prior and use QC, uncertainty, diversity, and real docking for allocation.
claim_boundary: Computational dual-docking geometry frontscreen only; not experimental binding, affinity, competition, or blocking.
